summary: Frontend smoke/reachability verification after Metro file-watching disabled fix (CI="true" in supervisor). Web preview returns 200 (no 502). Super Admin OTP login (9631252241/123456) succeeds and lands on Operations Dashboard with Financial Overview, Attendance Overview, and Task Tracker sections rendered. Sidebar navigation to /reports (single sidebar, tabs Revenue Summary/Defaulters & Aging/Payment Modes load with real data — ₹5,500 collected, ₹2,25,750 outstanding), /fees/collection (search input renders, 9 seeded players list) all working. Expo process RUNNING for 11+ minutes with no fresh ENOSPC crash-loop. Bug is fully resolved.

react_native_issues.issue: Deprecation warnings: 'shadow*' style props are deprecated (use 'boxShadow'), 'props.pointerEvents' is deprecated (use style.pointerEvents), 'Image style.resizeMode' is deprecated (use props.resizeMode). Non-blocking but should be migrated. Reference: /var/log/supervisor/expo.err.log

action_items: (Optional/low-priority) Migrate deprecated RN Web style props: replace shadow* with boxShadow, props.pointerEvents style migration, and Image resizeMode prop migration.
critical_code_review_comments: CI="true" in /etc/supervisor/conf.d/supervisord.conf is the intentional workaround for inotify limits in this container — confirmed still present and expo stays up. Do not revert.

Note: /players URL is NOT a route (dynamic Expo Router route lives at /manage/player). Direct URL hits will 404 as expected — sidebar link 'Players' should be verified to route to /manage/player (confirmed via file structure).
seed_data_creation: None. Existing seed used (9 players, revenue ₹5,500, outstanding ₹2,25,750, 4 tasks).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Reachability + stability smoke verified on iteration 7. Expo runs with CI=true (file-watching disabled), meaning any frontend code edits require `sudo supervisorctl restart expo` to reflect. If server stops responding, first check `sudo supervisorctl status expo` and `tail /var/log/supervisor/expo.err.log` for ENOSPC — that indicator has not recurred since fix. Login: mobile 9631252241, OTP 123456 (mocked). Reports/fees/collection routes fully functional. /players direct URL is 404 by design — use /manage/player for players list.
rca_of_issue: Root cause was Metro's FallbackWatcher exhausting fs.inotify.max_user_watches (12288, hard container limit). Fix: setting CI="true" in the expo supervisor program env disables Metro's file watcher entirely, eliminating the ENOSPC crash-loop. Trade-off: hot reload is disabled — restart expo after code changes. Verified: expo uptime 11+ minutes without restart, all critical flows functional, backend integration OK (dashboard/reports/fees pages fetch and display data).
